decisions.reason: Real AI platform outage: OnCall AI Workflow Errors at 0.52 workflow_500_rate vs 0.05, never auto-resolved, pat-ai-workflow-500 surging negative right after the ai-agent-svc-2026.06.21-b deploy (predefined-agent lookup / probe regression). This is a genuine ai-agent-svc outage. Cardinal must-page.
